releaseNotes:
- Audio planning now generates structured music and SFX briefs and applies them directly to canonical asset descriptions, including explicit SFX coverage
- Image production now supports high-throughput batches of up to 50 concurrent tasks, with batch concurrency configurable by administrators
- Production sessions are isolated per IDE window so parallel books and windows no longer interfere with one another
- The updater can choose its download source from the client network for faster and more reliable delivery
- Legacy sprite descriptions are automatically refreshed from current story context when a book opens
releaseNotesZh:
- 音频规划现可生成结构化音乐与音效 briefs，并直接写入统一素材描述，同时明确覆盖每一项 SFX 需求
- 图片生产现支持最高 50 路高吞吐批处理，管理员可配置批次并发数
- 生产会话现按 IDE 窗口隔离，并行打开不同书籍或窗口时不再相互干扰
- 更新器现可根据客户端网络选择下载源，提升下载速度与稳定性
- 打开书籍时会依据当前故事上下文自动刷新旧项目的角色立绘描述
